homepage.heroSubline: Protecting your home with expert roofing services. Serving Charlotte, NC and surrounding areas.
aboutText: Super Roofing Company started with a simple goal: to provide Charlotte homeowners with reliable, high-quality roofing solutions. We're not just roofers; we're your neighbors, committed to protecting your homes from the unpredictable North Carolina weather.

We built our reputation on honesty, integrity, and superior workmanship. We approach every project, from minor repairs to full roof replacements, with meticulous attention to detail and a commitment to exceeding your expectations. We understand the challenges of Charlotte's climate and build roofs to last.

We're deeply invested in the Charlotte community. We source materials locally whenever possible and actively support local charities. We're proud to contribute to the growth and resilience of our city.

valueProps.title: Local Expertise
valueProps.description: We understand Charlotte's unique climate and housing styles.

valueProps.title: Quality Materials
valueProps.description: We use only the best materials from trusted suppliers.

valueProps.title: Skilled Craftsmanship
valueProps.description: Our team is highly trained and experienced in all aspects of roofing.

valueProps.title: Transparent Pricing
valueProps.description: We provide clear and honest estimates with no hidden fees.

homepage.ctaSubline: Protect your biggest investment. Schedule your no-obligation inspection today.

services.name: Roof Replacement
services.shortDescription: Full roof replacement services for Charlotte homes.
services.description:
Is your roof nearing the end of its lifespan? Are you noticing leaks, missing shingles, or other signs of damage? It might be time for a complete roof replacement. Super Roofing Company offers expert roof replacement services tailored to the unique needs of Charlotte homes. We handle everything from removing your old roof to installing a brand new, durable, and beautiful roofing system. We understand Charlotte's weather patterns and recommend materials that can withstand the heat, humidity, and occasional ice storms.

We work with a wide variety of roofing materials, including asphalt shingles, metal roofing, and tile, ensuring that you find the perfect fit for your style and budget. Our team will guide you through the selection process, explaining the pros and cons of each option. We'll also handle all necessary permits and inspections, making the process as smooth and stress-free as possible.

A new roof is a significant investment, and we're committed to providing you with the highest quality workmanship and materials. We back our roof replacements with industry-leading warranties, giving you peace of mind knowing that your investment is protected for years to come. We'll ensure your new roof handles the summer heat and those occasional winter ice storms.
process: Step 1: Thorough roof inspection and assessment
Step 2: Material selection and customized proposal
Step 3: Removal of old roofing system
Step 4: Installation of new roofing system with quality flashing and underlayment

faq.question: How long does a roof replacement take?
faq.answer: The duration depends on the size and complexity of the roof, but most residential roof replacements take 3-5 days.

faq.question: What type of roofing material is best for Charlotte's climate?
faq.answer: Asphalt shingles are a popular and cost-effective choice, but metal roofing offers superior durability and longevity.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for a roof replacement?
faq.answer: Yes, a permit is required for roof replacements in Charlotte. We will handle the permit application process for you.

services.name: Roof Repair
services.shortDescription: Expert roof repair services to fix leaks and damage.
services.description:
Don't let a small leak turn into a major problem. Super Roofing Company provides prompt and reliable roof repair services throughout the Charlotte area. Whether you have missing shingles, a leaky chimney, or storm damage, our experienced technicians can quickly diagnose the issue and provide effective solutions. We know that Charlotte's unpredictable weather can take a toll on your roof, and we're here to help you protect your home from further damage.

We handle all types of roof repairs, from minor patching to major structural repairs. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure that your repairs are long-lasting and effective. We understand the urgency of roof repairs, and we offer 24/7 emergency service to address urgent issues. We’ll work to ensure your home is protected from the next sudden thunderstorm that rolls through the Queen City.

We'll provide you with a detailed estimate before starting any work, so you know exactly what to expect. We pride ourselves on our honest and transparent pricing, and we'll never try to sell you unnecessary services. Our goal is to provide you with the best possible service at a fair price, protecting your home from the elements.
process: Step 1: Thorough roof inspection to identify damage
Step 2: Detailed explanation of repair options and costs
Step 3: Secure the area to prevent further damage
Step 4: High-quality repairs using durable materials

faq.question: How do I know if my roof needs repair?
faq.answer: Signs of roof damage include leaks, missing shingles, water stains on ceilings, and sagging areas.

faq.question: How quickly can you respond to a roof repair request?
faq.answer: We offer 24/7 emergency service and can typically respond to urgent requests within a few hours.

faq.question: Do you offer a warranty on roof repairs?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a warranty on all of our roof repairs, giving you peace of mind knowing that your repairs are protected.

services.name: Gutter Services
services.shortDescription: Gutter Installation, repair, and cleaning for Charlotte homes.
services.description:
Properly functioning gutters are essential for protecting your home from water damage. Super Roofing Company offers comprehensive gutter services to keep your Charlotte home safe and dry. We provide gutter installation, repair, and cleaning services to ensure that your gutters are working efficiently and effectively.

We install seamless gutters, which are custom-made to fit your home perfectly, eliminating seams that can leak and cause problems. We also offer a variety of gutter materials, including aluminum, copper, and steel, so you can choose the best option for your budget and aesthetic preferences. Our team also provides gutter repair services, fixing leaks, sagging gutters, and other damage. We understand the importance of maintaining your gutters, and we offer regular cleaning services to remove leaves, debris, and other obstructions that can cause clogs and water damage.

Protect your home from the damaging effects of rain and snow with our expert gutter services. We'll ensure that your gutters are functioning properly, diverting water away from your foundation and protecting your home from water damage. We understand the red clay soil around Charlotte can create water issues and we can help direct water away from your foundations.
process: Step 1: Inspect existing gutter system
Step 2: Recommend gutter cleaning, repair, or replacement as needed
Step 3: Install or repair gutters with precision
Step 4: Ensure proper water flow and drainage away from the home
benefits: Extends the life of your roof

faq.question: How often should I clean my gutters?
faq.answer: We recommend cleaning your gutters at least twice a year, especially in the spring and fall.

faq.question: What are seamless gutters?
faq.answer: Seamless gutters are custom-made to fit your home, eliminating seams that can leak and cause problems.

faq.question: What are the benefits of gutter guards?
faq.answer: Gutter guards prevent leaves and debris from clogging your gutters, reducing the need for frequent cleaning.

services.name: Storm Damage Repair
services.shortDescription: Swift and reliable storm damage repair for Charlotte roofs.
services.description:
Charlotte's weather can be unpredictable, and severe storms can cause significant damage to your roof. Super Roofing Company provides fast and reliable storm damage repair services to help you get your home back to normal as quickly as possible. We understand the stress and inconvenience of dealing with storm damage, and we're here to help you navigate the insurance claims process and get your roof repaired quickly and efficiently.

Our team has extensive experience in dealing with storm damage, and we can quickly assess the damage and provide you with a detailed estimate for repairs. We work with all major insurance companies and can help you file your claim and get the compensation you deserve. We handle all types of storm damage, including wind damage, hail damage, and water damage. We'll work to ensure your roof is repaired to its pre-storm condition, protecting your home from further damage.

Don't let storm damage compromise the safety and security of your home. Contact Super Roofing Company for fast and reliable storm damage repair services. We'll work to get your roof repaired quickly and efficiently, giving you peace of mind knowing that your home is protected.
process: Step 1: Emergency roof tarping to prevent further damage
Step 2: Thorough damage assessment and documentation
Step 3: Assistance with insurance claim process
Step 4: Professional storm damage repairs

faq.question: What should I do immediately after a storm damages my roof?
faq.answer: Contact Super Roofing Company for emergency tarping to prevent further water damage. Also, document the damage with photos and videos for your insurance claim.

faq.question: How long do I have to file an insurance claim for storm damage?
faq.answer: The timeframe for filing a claim varies by insurance company, but it's best to file as soon as possible after the storm.

faq.question: Will filing a claim raise my insurance rates?
faq.answer: Filing a claim for storm damage may or may not raise your rates, depending on your insurance policy and the extent of the damage.

services.name: Roof Inspections
services.shortDescription: Comprehensive roof inspections to assess roof health.
services.description:
Protect your investment with regular roof inspections from Super Roofing Company. Our comprehensive roof inspections can identify potential problems early on, preventing costly repairs down the road. Whether you're buying or selling a home, or simply want to ensure that your roof is in good condition, our experienced inspectors can provide you with a detailed assessment of your roof's health.

We thoroughly inspect all aspects of your roof, including shingles, flashing, gutters, and ventilation. We'll identify any signs of damage, such as leaks, missing shingles, or rot, and provide you with a detailed report of our findings. We understand the importance of a healthy roof, and we'll provide you with recommendations for any necessary repairs or maintenance.

Don't wait until you have a major problem to inspect your roof. Regular roof inspections can help you extend the life of your roof and prevent costly repairs. Contact Super Roofing Company today to schedule your comprehensive roof inspection. We inspect roofs all across Charlotte and the surrounding areas.
process: Step 1: Thorough visual inspection of roof surface
Step 2: Check all flashing and penetration points
Step 3: Inspect gutters and downspouts for proper drainage
Step 4: Detailed report with photos and recommendations

faq.question: How often should I have my roof inspected?
faq.answer: We recommend having your roof inspected at least once a year, and after any major storm.

faq.question: What is included in a roof inspection?
faq.answer: Our roof inspections include a thorough visual inspection of all aspects of your roof, including shingles, flashing, gutters, and ventilation.

faq.question: How much does a roof inspection cost?
faq.answer: Contact us for a free quote on our comprehensive roof inspection services.

services.name: Commercial Roofing
services.shortDescription: Commercial roofing services for Charlotte businesses.
services.description:
Super Roofing Company provides commercial roofing services for businesses throughout the Charlotte area. We understand the unique needs of commercial properties, and we offer a wide range of roofing solutions to meet your specific requirements. Whether you need a new roof, roof repairs, or regular maintenance, our experienced team can provide you with the highest quality workmanship and materials.

We work with a variety of commercial roofing materials, including TPO, EPDM, and metal roofing. We understand the importance of minimizing downtime for your business, and we'll work to complete your project quickly and efficiently, without disrupting your operations. We also offer preventative maintenance programs to help you extend the life of your commercial roof and prevent costly repairs.

Protect your business with a durable and reliable roof from Super Roofing Company. Contact us today to discuss your commercial roofing needs. We understand the needs of businesses in Charlotte.
process: Step 1: On-site evaluation of commercial roofing needs
Step 2: Customized roofing solutions and material selection
Step 3: Expert installation with minimal disruption
Step 4: Ongoing maintenance and support

faq.question: What types of commercial roofing materials do you offer?
faq.answer: We offer a variety of commercial roofing materials, including TPO, EPDM, and metal roofing.

faq.question: How long does a commercial roofing project take?
faq.answer: The duration of a commercial roofing project depends on the size and complexity of the roof, but we'll work to complete your project as quickly as possible.

faq.question: Do you offer preventative maintenance programs for commercial roofs?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer preventative maintenance programs to help you extend the life of your commercial roof and prevent costly repairs.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Super Roofing replaced our roof after the last big hailstorm. They were incredibly professional, explained everything clearly, and the new roof looks fantastic! Highly recommend. They even helped navigate the insurance claim which was a huge relief.

reviews.name: John B.
reviews.text: We had a leak around our chimney, and Super Roofing fixed it quickly and efficiently. The technician was knowledgeable and explained the problem clearly. Price was fair and they showed up on time. Would use them again.

reviews.name: Emily K.
reviews.text: Excellent gutter cleaning service! They were thorough and cleaned up everything afterward. Our gutters were overflowing before, and now they're working perfectly. Great communication from the office too.

reviews.name: David S.
reviews.text: Super Roofing was a lifesaver after the recent windstorm. They responded quickly, tarped our roof to prevent further damage, and worked with our insurance company to get the repairs done. Very professional and reliable.

reviews.name: Lisa R.
reviews.text: We had Super Roofing inspect our roof before buying a new home in Myers Park. They provided a detailed report with photos and recommendations. It gave us peace of mind knowing the roof was in good condition. Very helpful service.

reviews.name: Robert P.
reviews.text: Super Roofing Company did an outstanding job replacing the roof on our commercial building. Their team was professional, efficient, and completed the project on time and within budget. Highly recommend their services for any commercial roofing needs.
